You're running an unsigned public beta of The Civic Desk. Windows SmartScreen may warn on install; that's expected. Report issues on GitHub.

Lead: A new official primary document from 'Longmont Public Information' was fetched today (https://longmontcolorado.gov/public-information/).

Why now: Newly fetched official page; verify a current change before treating it as news.

Article Format
Brief (Under 200 words summary)
Watch Alert (Highlights specific public safety or procurement issues)
Explainer (Detailed review of a policy or decision background)
Investigation (Traces spending and connections behind a story)
Editorial / Opinion Piece (Presents a structured argument)
Custom Guidelines / Instructions (Optional)
Linked Sources (1)
